definitions: A social theory favoring freedom of action for individuals over collective or state control.
The habit or principle of being independent and self-reliant.
A doctrine that the interests of the individual are paramount.
The quality of being an individual rather than a member of a group.
examples: The rise of individualism in modern society.
His strong sense of individualism was evident.
The philosophy emphasizes individualism and personal responsibility.
Individualism can lead to both innovation and isolation.
